name: Crab Fondue (Absolutely Marvelous)
recipeIngredient: 1 Loaf French bread, cut into 1-inch cubes
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine all ingredients except the French bread in a pan.
2. Stir over low heat until the cheese melts and all ingredients are well mixed.
Serve over a low flame. Use the bread cubes as dippers.
